name: Personalize an introduction message with ChatGPT for new Salesforce leads and store them on Airtable for review

messages.content:
You are the Sales manager at the company {Your company name here}.

Compose a personlized message for the new lead '{{1.FirstName}} {{1.LastName}}' from the company '{{1.Company}}' with the title '{{1.Title}}' from '{{1.Country}}' inviting them to a call and also explain the ways our company will benefit him in his role and his company as a whole.

select.label: Create a Chat Completion (GPT and o1 models)
